scripts.test:long-filters: vitest run src/filters src/longGate src/longBuckets src/longAudits src/combos src/audits/bestDnaLongAudit.test.js --reporter=verbose
scripts.test:long-research-cockpit: vitest run src/research src/safety src/filters src/longAudits src/longGate src/scoring/longAbsoluteEntryScore src/scoring/longCandidateRunner src/scoring/longPostFee10 src/outcomes src/export --pool=forks --maxWorkers=4 --minWorkers=1 --testTimeout=15000 --hookTimeout=15000
scripts.test:ci: npm run check:all-source-syntax && npm run build && npm run test:unit:shard1 && npm run test:unit:shard2 && npm run test:long-purity && npm run check:long-filter-purity && npm run check:long-export-purity
scripts.test:long-research-cockpit:shard1: vitest run src/research src/safety src/filters src/longAudits src/longGate src/scoring/longAbsoluteEntryScore src/scoring/longCandidateRunner src/scoring/longPostFee10 src/outcomes src/export --pool=forks --maxWorkers=2 --minWorkers=1 --testTimeout=15000 --hookTimeout=15000 --shard=1/2
scripts.test:long-research-cockpit:shard2: vitest run src/research src/safety src/filters src/longAudits src/longGate src/scoring/longAbsoluteEntryScore src/scoring/longCandidateRunner src/scoring/longPostFee10 src/outcomes src/export --pool=forks --maxWorkers=2 --minWorkers=1 --testTimeout=15000 --hookTimeout=15000 --shard=2/2
